About the Graduate School of Health Sciences

Graduate School of Health Sciences is carried out

in accordance with the objectives and principles of the Higher Education Law No. 2547 "Graduate Educationududar University Graduate Education and Examination Regulation", which was prepared in accordance with the provisions of the "Regulation on the Organization and Functioning of Graduate Schools" and the "Regulation on Graduate Education and Training" and published in the Official Gazette dated 08. 01. 2014 and published in the Official Gazette dated 08. 2014 and numbered 28876 "Üsküdar University Graduate Education and Examination Regulations".

Our Institute of Health Sciences aims to train scientists and competent experts in their fields by using the experience and knowledge of our University in the fields of behavioral and health sciences with its distinguished teaching staff and by using our University's experience and knowledge in the fields of behavioral and health sciences, and by contributing to national and international preferred, respected, creative and universal science.

Within the Institute of Health Sciences;

Addiction Counseling and Rehabilitation Master's Program (With / Without Thesis)

Nutrition and Dietetics Master's Program (with/without Thesis)

Child Development Master's Program (With / Without Thesis)
